tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Madonna
Song: Vogue
Album: I'm Breathless
Tabbed by: Don Tago
email: recebedou@yahoo.com

Standard Tuning: (Capo I)

Intro: [ch]G[/ch] 

Verse 1 chords:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                        
Look around everywhere you turn is heartache[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] 
It's everywhere that you go [look around][/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                      
You try everything you can to escape[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          
The pain of life that you know [life that you know][/tab]


Pre-chorus 1 chords:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
When all else fails and you long to be[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Something better than you are today[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I know a place where you can get away[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]F[/ch]
It's called a dance floor, and here's what it's for, so[/tab]


Chorus 1 chords:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Come on, vogue[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
Let your body move to the music [move to the music] Hey, hey, hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
Come on, vogue[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
Let your body go with the flow [go with the flow] You know you can do it[/tab]

Verse 2: [use verse 1 chords]
All you need is your own imagination
So use it that's what it's for [that's what it's for]
Go inside, for your finest inspiration
Your dreams will open the door [open up the door]

Pre-Chorus 2: [use pre-chorus 1 chords
It makes no difference if you're black or white
If you're a boy or a girl
If the music's pumping it will give you new life
You're a superstar, yes, that's what you are, you know it

Chorus 2 chords: [use chorus 1 chords]
Come on, vogue
Let your groove move to the music [groove to the music] Hey, hey, hey
Come on, vogue
Let your body go with the flow [go with the flow] You know you can do it


Bridge chords:
[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]        
Beauty's where, where you find it[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Not just where you bump and grind it[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]        
Soul is in the musical[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      
That's where I feel so [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Beautiful, Magical, life's a ball, so get up on the dance floor[/tab]


Chorus 3 chords: [use chorus 1 chords]
Come on, vogue
Let your groove move to the music [groove to the music] Hey, hey, hey
Come on, vogue
Let your body go with the flow [go with the flow] You know you can do it

Breakdown: [use chorus 1 chords]
Greta Garbo, and Monroe
Deitrich and DiMaggio
Marlon Brando, Jimmy Dean
On the cover of a magazine
Grace Kelly; Harlow, Jean
Picture of a beauty queen
Gene Kelly, Fred Astaire
Ginger Rogers, dance on air
They had style, they had grace
Rita Hayworth gave good face
Lauren, Katherine, Lana too
Bette Davis, we love you
Ladies with an attitude
Fellows that were in the mood
Don't just stand there, let's get to it
Strike a pose, there's nothing to it


Chorus 4 chords: [use chorus 1 chords]
Come on, vogue
Let your groove move to the music [groove to the music] Hey, hey, hey
Come on, vogue
Let your body go with the flow [go with the flow] You know you can do it
